nasb.text: So Joshua and all the people of war with him came upon them suddenly by the waters of Merom, and attacked them.

esv.text: So Joshua and all his warriors came suddenly against them by the waters of Merom and fell upon them.

cnv.text: 於是約書亞和所有與他在一起能作戰的人，在米倫水邊突然迫近，攻打他們。

ccb.text: 于是，约书亚率领所有的军兵在米伦河边突袭敌军。
